metadata.summary: Displays a nicely formatted report in your terminal from a DMARC XML report.

documentation:
# DMARC Report Tool

Displays a nicely formatted report in your terminal from a DMARC XML report.

## Installation

This works best when installed with `uv tool` or `pipx`.

```bash
# With uv:
uv tool install dmarc-report

# Or with pipx:

pipx install dmarc-report
```

You can also run the tool without installing it:

```bash
# With uvx:
uvx dmarc-report long-dmarc-report-filename.xml
```

## Usage

Run the `dmarc-report` command-line utility followed by a DMARC report file.
The DMARC report can have one of the following file extensions:

- `.xml.gz`
- `.zip`
- `.xml`

```bash
dmarc-report long-dmarc-report-filename.xml.gz
# or
dmarc-report long-dmarc-report-filename.xml
# or
dmarc-report long-dmarc-report-filename.zip
```

Note: if using a zip file, it will only parse the first xml file found in the zip file.

You'll see a nicely formatted report in your terminal:

```text
╭──────────────────────────────────── DMARC Report for example.com ─────────────────────────────────────╮
│                                                                                                       │
│ Domain: example.com                                                                                   │
│ Report Period: 2020-01-01 00:00:00 UTC to 2020-01-01 23:59:59 UTC                                     │
│                                                                                                       │
╰───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
   Summary Statistics
╭────────────────┬──────╮
│ Total Messages │ 2    │
│ Unique Sources │ 1    │
│ DKIM Pass Rate │ 0.0% │
│ SPF Pass Rate  │ 0.0% │
╰────────────────┴──────╯
                           DMARC Report Metadata
╭────────────────────┬────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ Org name           │ Google, Inc.                                       │
│ Email              │ noreply-dmarc-support@google.com                   │
│ Extra contact info │ https://support.google.com/a/answer/2466580        │
│ Report ID          │ 1234567890                                         │
│ Date range         │ 2020-01-01 00:00:00 UTC to 2020-01-01 23:59:59 UTC │
╰────────────────────┴────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯

       DMARC Policy Details
╭──────────────────┬─────────────╮
│ Domain           │ example.com │
│ DKIM Alignment   │ r           │
│ SPF Alignment    │ r           │
│ Policy           │ quarantine  │
│ Subdomain Policy │ reject      │
│ Percent          │ 100         │
╰──────────────────┴─────────────╯

                                      Message Records
╭─────────────┬───────┬─────────────┬──────┬──────┬─────────────┬──────────────────────────╮
│ Source IP   │ Count │ Disposition │ DKIM │ SPF  │ Header From │ Auth Results             │
├─────────────┼───────┼─────────────┼──────┼──────┼─────────────┼──────────────────────────┤
│ 203.0.113.1 │ 2     │ none        │ pass │ pass │             │ dkim: example.com (pass) │
│             │       │             │      │      │             │ spf: example.com (pass)  │
╰─────────────┴───────┴─────────────┴──────┴──────┴─────────────┴──────────────────────────╯

 🚀 End of report
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
```

modules.name: dmarc_report.report
documentation: Command line interface for parsing and displaying DMARC reports.

functions.name: dmarc_report.report.report
documentation: Parse and display DMARC reports from the command line.

modules.name: dmarc_report
documentation: DMARC report parser and display tool.

modules.name: dmarc_report.dmarc_parser
documentation: Parse DMARC XML reports and display the results using Rich tables and panels.

classes.name: dmarc_report.dmarc_parser.PolicyType
documentation: Policy types for DMARC.

classes.name: dmarc_report.dmarc_parser.AlignmentMode
documentation: Alignment modes for DKIM and SPF.

classes.name: dmarc_report.dmarc_parser.AuthResultType

class_variables.name: dmarc_report.dmarc_parser.AuthResultType.PASS
documentation: noqa: S105

class_variables.name: dmarc_report.dmarc_parser.AuthResultType.SOFTFAIL
documentation: SPF only

Authentication result types for DKIM and SPF.

The AuthResultType enum corresponds to the <result> element in the <dkim> and <spf> elements of the DMARC XML
report.

classes.name: dmarc_report.dmarc_parser.DateRange

methods.name: dmarc_report.dmarc_parser.DateRange.__str__
documentation: Return formatted date range string.

methods.name: dmarc_report.dmarc_parser.DateRange.format_timestamp
documentation: Convert UTC Unix timestamp to formatted UTC date string.

Date range object containing begin and end timestamps.

The DateRange object corresponds to the <date_range> element in the DMARC XML report.

classes.name: dmarc_report.dmarc_parser.ReportMetadata

class_variables.name: dmarc_report.dmarc_parser.ReportMetadata.errors
documentation: Not yet implemented

Report metadata object containing report recipient details.

The ReportMetadata object corresponds to the <report_metadata> element in the DMARC XML report.

classes.name: dmarc_report.dmarc_parser.PolicyPublished

methods.name: dmarc_report.dmarc_parser.PolicyPublished.__post_init__
documentation: Convert string values to enums if needed and validate percentage.

Policy published object containing DMARC policy details.

The PolicyPublished object corresponds to the <policy_published> element in the DMARC XML report.

classes.name: dmarc_report.dmarc_parser.PolicyEvaluated

methods.name: dmarc_report.dmarc_parser.PolicyEvaluated.__post_init__
documentation: Convert string values to enums if needed.

class_variables.name: dmarc_report.dmarc_parser.PolicyEvaluated.reason
documentation: type and comment. Not yet implemented

Policy evaluated object containing disposition and authentication results.

The PolicyEvaluated object corresponds to the <policy_evaluated> element in the <record> element of DMARC XML
report.

classes.name: dmarc_report.dmarc_parser.Identifier
documentation:
Identifier object containing message header and envelope details.

The Identifier object corresponds to the <identifiers> element in the <record> element of DMARC XML report.

classes.name: dmarc_report.dmarc_parser.DKIMAuthResult

methods.name: dmarc_report.dmarc_parser.DKIMAuthResult.__post_init__
documentation: Convert string values to enums if needed.

DKIM authentication result object.

The DKIMAuthResult object corresponds to the <dkim> element in the <auth_results> element of DMARC XML report.

classes.name: dmarc_report.dmarc_parser.SPFAuthResult

methods.name: dmarc_report.dmarc_parser.SPFAuthResult.__post_init__
documentation: Convert string values to enums if needed and validate scope.

SPF authentication result object.

The SPFAuthResult object corresponds to the <spf> element in the <auth_results> element of DMARC XML report.

classes.name: dmarc_report.dmarc_parser.AuthResults
documentation:
Authentication results for DKIM and SPF.

The AuthResults object corresponds to the <auth_results> element in the DMARC XML report.

classes.name: dmarc_report.dmarc_parser.Record
documentation:
DMARC record object containing message details and authentication results.

The Record object corresponds to the <record> element in the DMARC XML report.

methods.name: dmarc_report.dmarc_parser.Report.report_id

methods.name: dmarc_report.dmarc_parser.Report.display
documentation: Display the DMARC report using Rich tables and panels.

DMARC report object containing metadata, policy, and records.

This class provides properties and methods to access and display the DMARC report data.

classes.name: dmarc_report.dmarc_parser.DMARCParser

methods.name: dmarc_report.dmarc_parser.DMARCParser.parse_file
documentation:
Parse a DMARC report file and return a Report object.

Handles .xml, .xml.gz, and .zip file types.

Args:
    filepath (str): Path to the DMARC report file.

Returns:
    Report: A Report object containing the parsed DMARC report data.

Raises:
    ValueError: If the file type is not supported.

methods.name: dmarc_report.dmarc_parser.DMARCParser._read_zip
documentation:
Parse a zipped DMARC XML report file and return the content.

Looks for the first .xml file in the zip archive.

Args:
    filepath (str): Path to the zip archive containing the DMARC XML report.

Returns:
    str: The content of the first XML file found in the zip archive.

Raises:
    ValueError: If no XML file is found in the zip archive.

methods.name: dmarc_report.dmarc_parser.DMARCParser._read_gzip
documentation:
Parse a gzipped DMARC XML report file and return the content.

Args:
    filepath (str): Path to the gzipped DMARC XML report file.

Returns:
    str: The content of the gzipped XML file.

methods.name: dmarc_report.dmarc_parser.DMARCParser._read_xml
documentation:
Parse a DMARC XML report file and return the content.

Args:
    filepath (str): Path to the DMARC XML report file.

Returns:
    str: The content of the XML file.

methods.name: dmarc_report.dmarc_parser.DMARCParser.parse_xml
documentation:
Parse an XML ElementTree and return a Report object.

This is the main logic that parses the DMARC XML report.

Args:
    root (Element): The root of the XML ElementTree.

Returns:
    Report: A Report object containing the parsed DMARC report data.

Raises:
    ValueError: If the XML structure is invalid or missing required fields.

methods.name: dmarc_report.dmarc_parser.DMARCParser.format_date_range
documentation: Convert UTC Unix timestamp to formatted UTC date string.

Parse DMARC XML reports.

This class provides methods to parse DMARC XML reports from files and strings.

When used with the `parse_file` method, it can handle .xml, .xml.gz, and .zip file types, and will return a Report
object.
